/usr/bin/cc -std=gnu99  -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wwrite-strings -Wdeclaration-after-statement -DUSE_MYSQL -rdynamic CMakeFiles/sysbench.dir/src/sysbench.c.o CMakeFiles/sysbench.dir/src/sb_timer.c.o CMakeFiles/sysbench.dir/src/sb_options.c.o CMakeFiles/sysbench.dir/src/sb_logger.c.o CMakeFiles/sysbench.dir/src/db_driver.c.o CMakeFiles/sysbench.dir/src/sb_histogram.c.o CMakeFiles/sysbench.dir/src/sb_rand.c.o CMakeFiles/sysbench.dir/src/sb_thread.c.o CMakeFiles/sysbench.dir/src/sb_barrier.c.o CMakeFiles/sysbench.dir/src/sb_lua.c.o CMakeFiles/sysbench.dir/src/sb_util.c.o CMakeFiles/sysbench.dir/src/sb_counter.c.o -o sysbench  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib64/mysql /home/jeb/mariadb_foundation_labs/test_client_src/sysbench-lua/third_party/luajit/luajit/src/libluajit.a -ldl /home/jeb/mariadb_foundation_labs/test_client_src/sysbench-lua/third_party/concurrency_kit/ck/src/libck.a src/drivers/mysql/libsbmysql.a /usr/lib64/mysql/libmysqlclient.so -lpthread -lm src/tests/cpu/libsbcpu.a src/tests/fileio/libsbfileio.a src/tests/mutex/libsbmutex.a src/tests/threads/libsbthreads.a src/tests/memory/libsbmemory.a -lpthread -lm
